hash: 7f839401ab0a path: .specify/memory/constitution.md

# Rocket Surgeons Guild — Conventions Constitution

## Core Principles

### I. Convention-First, Reflection-Never

All application wiring (services, configuration, logging, hosting) is expressed via assembly-level convention attributes. The Roslyn incremental source generator (`src/Conventions.Analyzers/`) resolves and orders conventions at build time, emitting strongly-typed `Imports` classes. Zero runtime reflection — every scan is AOT and trimming safe.

### II. Abstractions Drive Everything

Public contracts live in `src/Conventions.Abstractions/`. Implementations across hosting, DI containers, and integrations depend on those abstractions, never on each other. Adding a new integration means implementing the abstraction, not forking existing code.

### III. Public API Surface is a Contract (RS0017)

`RS0017` is a **build error**. Every change to public API requires updating the tracked API file. Public types are annotated `[PublicAPI]`. Breaking changes follow semantic versioning and are gated by the release pipeline — they are never accidental.

### IV. Central Package Management, No Version Drift

All NuGet package versions live in `Directory.Packages.props`. `.csproj` files never specify versions. `GlobalPackageReference` entries apply analyzers and build tooling uniformly across all projects. NuGet audit runs at `moderate` level on every build.

### V. Snapshot Tests Guard the Generator

Generated code is verified against committed snapshots in `test/Analyzers.Tests/snapshots/`. A failing snapshot means the generator output changed — review the diff, accept intentional changes with `dotnet verify accept`. Never accept snapshots blindly.

## Code Standards

- **Language**: C# with `LangVersion=preview`, `Nullable=enable`, `ImplicitUsings=enable`, `Features=strict`
- **Runtime target**: `net10.0` (primary); `net8.0` where compat is required; `netstandard2.0` for the generator
- **Global usings**: `JetBrains.Annotations`, `System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis`, `NotNullAttribute` alias applied to all projects
- **Warnings as errors**: `RS0017` only — do not silently suppress other warnings without justification
- **Formatting**: `prettier --write .` for non-C# files; `dotnet format` for C#; CI enforces both via `lint.yml`
- **No magic package versions in csproj** — always add to `Directory.Packages.props` first

## Development Workflow

**Build**: `mise run build` (full CI pipeline via ModularPipelines in `build/Build.cs`)

**Test**:

- Framework: TUnit on Microsoft.Testing.Platform (not VSTest)
- Test classes inherit `AutoFakeTest<TUnitTestRecord>` from `Rocket.Surgery.Extensions.Testing.TUnit`
- Mocks: FakeItEasy · Assertions: Shouldly · Snapshots: Verify.TUnit
- Run all: `dotnet test`
- Run single: `dotnet run --project test/<Project> -- --treenode-filter "*/..."`
- Accept snapshots: `dotnet verify accept`

**Docs**: `mise run docs` (VitePress dev server)

**Format**: `prettier --write . && dotnet format`

**Release**: GitVersion computes semver from branch/tag; GitReleaseManager publishes changelogs; NuGet publish is CI-gated on tag push.

**Dependency updates**: Renovate runs automatically; bot PRs are auto-merged for minor/patch after CI passes.

## Governance

This constitution supersedes all other practices in this repository. Amendments require updating this file and the corresponding `CLAUDE.md` (auto-synced from here by speckit). All PRs should verify compliance with the public API tracking file, snapshot tests, and formatting checks before merge. Complexity must be justified — prefer extending existing abstractions over adding new ones.

**Version**: 1.0.0 | **Ratified**: 2026-06-26 | **Last Amended**: 2026-06-26

<!-- SPEC-KIT CONSTITUTION: END -->

# Constitution

# Rocket Surgeons Guild — Conventions Constitution

## Core Principles

### I. Convention-First, Reflection-Never

All application wiring (services, configuration, logging, hosting) is expressed via assembly-level convention attributes. The Roslyn incremental source generator (`src/Conventions.Analyzers/`) resolves and orders conventions at build time, emitting strongly-typed `Imports` classes. Zero runtime reflection — every scan is AOT and trimming safe.

### II. Abstractions Drive Everything

Public contracts live in `src/Conventions.Abstractions/`. Implementations across hosting, DI containers, and integrations depend on those abstractions, never on each other. Adding a new integration means implementing the abstraction, not forking existing code.

### III. Public API Surface is a Contract (RS0017)

`RS0017` is a **build error**. Every change to public API requires updating the tracked API file. Public types are annotated `[PublicAPI]`. Breaking changes follow semantic versioning and are gated by the release pipeline — they are never accidental.

### IV. Central Package Management, No Version Drift

All NuGet package versions live in `Directory.Packages.props`. `.csproj` files never specify versions. `GlobalPackageReference` entries apply analyzers and build tooling uniformly across all projects. NuGet audit runs at `moderate` level on every build.

### V. Snapshot Tests Guard the Generator

Generated code is verified against committed snapshots in `test/Analyzers.Tests/snapshots/`. A failing snapshot means the generator output changed — review the diff, accept intentional changes with `dotnet verify accept`. Never accept snapshots blindly.

## Code Standards

- **Language**: C# with `LangVersion=preview`, `Nullable=enable`, `ImplicitUsings=enable`, `Features=strict`
- **Runtime target**: `net10.0` (primary); `net8.0` where compat is required; `netstandard2.0` for the generator
- **Global usings**: `JetBrains.Annotations`, `System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis`, `NotNullAttribute` alias applied to all projects
- **Warnings as errors**: `RS0017` only — do not silently suppress other warnings without justification
- **Formatting**: `prettier --write .` for non-C# files; `dotnet format` for C#; CI enforces both via `lint.yml`
- **No magic package versions in csproj** — always add to `Directory.Packages.props` first

## Development Workflow

**Build**: `mise run build` (full CI pipeline via ModularPipelines in `build/Build.cs`)

**Test**:

- Framework: TUnit on Microsoft.Testing.Platform (not VSTest)
- Test classes inherit `AutoFakeTest<TUnitTestRecord>` from `Rocket.Surgery.Extensions.Testing.TUnit`
- Mocks: FakeItEasy · Assertions: Shouldly · Snapshots: Verify.TUnit
- Run all: `dotnet test`
- Run single: `dotnet run --project test/<Project> -- --treenode-filter "*/..."`
- Accept snapshots: `dotnet verify accept`

**Docs**: `mise run docs` (VitePress dev server)

**Format**: `prettier --write . && dotnet format`

**Release**: GitVersion computes semver from branch/tag; GitReleaseManager publishes changelogs; NuGet publish is CI-gated on tag push.

**Dependency updates**: Renovate runs automatically; bot PRs are auto-merged for minor/patch after CI passes.

## Governance

This constitution supersedes all other practices in this repository. Amendments require updating this file and the corresponding `CLAUDE.md` (auto-synced from here by speckit). All PRs should verify compliance with the public API tracking file, snapshot tests, and formatting checks before merge. Complexity must be justified — prefer extending existing abstractions over adding new ones.
